name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 transactions/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 transactions/month, inaccurate petty cash reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual tracking of receipts and expenses.
problem_solved: Inaccurate petty cash reconciliation leading to financial discrepancies.
features: Manual entry option for cash transactions
